name: A123 Systems, Inc.
description: A123 Systems, Inc. is a developer and manufacturer of advanced lithium-ion batteries and energy storage systems. The company provides high-power and high-energy density cells, modules, and systems for the transportation, grid energy storage, and commercial markets. Founded in 2001, A123 Systems utilizes its proprietary Nanophosphate technology to deliver safer, longer-lasting, and more powerful energy storage solutions designed to meet the demanding requirements of automotive and industrial applications worldwide.
